data.title: A $15.7 Billion EV Write-Down Lead To Honda's First Unprofitable Year Since 1957
data.description: Honda recently reported a significant write-down of $15.7 billion on its investments in electric vehicles, leading to the company's first unprofitable year since 1957. This announcement caused a drop in share prices both in the U.S. and internationally.

data.title: Data Axle Named a Leader in Independent B2B Data Provider Evaluation
data.description: Data Axle was recognized as a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Marketing and Sales Data Providers for B2B, Q1 2026, achieving the highest scores in vision, innovation, and roadmap criteria. The company received acclaim for its exceptional performance, further highlighted by its top ranking in the industry evaluation. This acknowledgment solidifies Data Axle's position as a standout player in the marketing and sales data segment.

data.title: Nvidia Partner Synopsys Accelerates Shift From Silicon To Systems
data.description: This week, Synopsys outlined the benefits of acquiring Ansys to expedite its transition from focusing on chips to entire electronic systems. This move will enable the EDA company to enhance its shift towards complete electronic systems. The mentioned post emphasized how Synopsys, a partner of Nvidia, is leveraging this acquisition to drive its shift towards systems, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: SafeSport Concludes International Symposia on Safeguarding in Sports
data.description: Two international symposiums were recently held in Cortina d'Ampezzo and Milan, bringing together global Olympic and Paralympic leaders to encourage collaboration in preparation for the upcoming LA28 Games. The U.S. Center for SafeSport disclosed the successful conclusion of these events, which aimed at fostering safer environments for athletes. This initiative signifies a crucial step towards ensuring the well-being of athletes worldwide.

data.title: Key Fed Inflation Data Hot As Oil Prices Torch Rate-Cut Hopes; S&P 500 Futures Rise (Live Coverage)
data.description: Inflation had been a consistent issue prior to the conflict in Iran. Following the release of key inflation data by the Federal Reserve, hopes for a rate cut were dampened as oil prices soared. S&P 500 futures saw an increase in response to this news.

data.title: Michael Baker International Announces Mid-Atlantic Regional Organizational Updates
data.description: In a recent announcement on March 13, 2026, Michael Baker International, a prominent engineering and consulting firm, revealed some key leadership changes within their ranks. Dwain Hathaway, a Professional Engineer, has been elevated to the position of Regional Practice Lead for the Bridge and Transportation sector in the Mid-Atlantic Region. Additionally, Walt Gray, a Certified Public Accountant, has been appointed as the Office Executive for North Carolina. These alterations signify a strategic move by the company to enhance their expertise and leadership in their operations.
Mike Kelly has recently reported fresh stock transactions.

data.title: NewtekOne, Inc. Declares Dividends on Common Stock and Series B Preferred Shares
data.description: A company based in Boca Raton, Florida, NewtekOne, Inc., publicly traded under the ticker symbol NEWT on NASDAQ, revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.19 per share for its common stock. Shareholders as of March 24, 2026, will be eligible to receive this dividend, which will be distributed on April 1, 2026.

data.title: Accenture Announces Reinvention Services Leadership
data.description: Accenture has revealed their new leadership team for Reinvention Services, spearheaded by Manish Sharma, who holds the role of Chief Strategy and Services Officer at Accenture.

data.title: Enterprise Connect Debuts in Las Vegas with Record Energy, Sets Return for 2027
data.description: In Las Vegas, the renowned conference for enterprise communications and customer experience, Enterprise Connect, recently held its first show at Caesars Forum. The event in its new location attracted over 2,700 registrants and featured 160 speakers along with 90 exhibitors. This West Coast debut was a success, indicating a promising return to Las Vegas in March.

data.title: CobbleStone Software Honored as a Best Place to Work in 2026 by CIOBulletin
data.description: CobbleStone Software has been named one of the Best Places to Work in 2026 by CIOBulletin. The company's award reflects its commitment to innovation, employee well-being, and expertise in AI-driven contract management. This recognition highlights CobbleStone Software's strong leadership and positive work environment. The announcement was made in Princeton, N.J. on March 13, 2026.

data.title: Sun Auto Network Prioritizes Community Engagement With Launch of Impact Program
data.description: Sun Auto has launched Drive With Purpose, a national community impact initiative that links store operations with local giving and community support. This initiative builds on the company's commitment to charitable giving, with over $70,000 invested in 2025 alone.

data.title: Lianhe Sowell International Group Ltd. Announces Non-Binding MOU with World Mobile, A Global Decentralized Communications Network Operator
data.description: On March 13, 2026, in Shenzhen, China, Lianhe Sowell International Group Ltd, listed on Nasdaq as LHSW, revealed a significant development. The company, known for its industrial machine vision products and solutions in China, disclosed the signing of a non-binding Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with World Mobile Group Ltd. This global decentralized communications network operator will join forces with Lianhe Sowell International Group Ltd in a strategic partnership. The MOU discussions were instigated and guided by OOKC Investment Holdings Group, a global digital asset investment entity. OOKC will play a crucial role in the collaboration as a strategic facilitator and ecosystem architect, providing vital support for the potential joint effort.

data.title: Akari Therapeutics Releases CEO Corner Highlighting Strategic Progress and Path to Clinical Development Under CEO Abizer Gaslightwala
data.description: Under the leadership of Abizer Gaslightwala, significant strategic milestones have been reached at Akari Therapeutics. This includes progress in the development of AKTX-101 and the expansion of the company's ADC pipeline. These achievements showcase the company's commitment to innovation and growth in the field.
